data.body:
Only Sensei's true sincerity can open their hearts — a heart-racing(?) 'Total Assault' is about to begin! 💗

From the PV to physical goods and a whole lineup of digital goods, you can find everything on the special webpage!

➡️ See details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3403458
